title: About MOE
body:
Our Mission

The Ministry of Education (MOE) is dedicated to shaping the future of Singapore through education. We believe that every child deserves access to quality education that nurtures their potential and prepares them for life.

Our Vision

To be a world-class education system that inspires lifelong learning and empowers every individual to contribute to society.

Our Values

  • Integrity: We uphold the highest standards of honesty and ethical conduct.
  • Excellence: We strive for continuous improvement and innovation.
  • Care: We nurture and support every learner and educator.
  • Collaboration: We work together with stakeholders to achieve our goals.

Our Role

MOE oversees the development and implementation of education policies, manages national curricula, and regulates the education sector to ensure quality and accessibility for all.
